description: Redaction and Privacy — manages PII redaction requests, SSN/DOB removal from recorded documents, and address confidentiality program compliance

hard_stops.label: No Legal Authority for Redaction
hard_stops.logic: Requestor has not cited a valid statutory or court-ordered authority for redacting information from the public record

hard_stops.label: Redaction Would Remove Material Terms
hard_stops.logic: Proposed redaction would remove material terms of the recorded document (legal description, parties, consideration) — exceeds permissible scope

soft_flags.label: Bulk Redaction Request
soft_flags.logic: Request covers more than 10 documents — may require supervisory approval and extended processing time
